source: RMC-BestFit/src/RMC.BestFit/Analyses/Bivariate/BivariateAnalysis.cs @ fc28c0c -- X11 SELF-COMPUTED structural smoke oracle. BivariateAnalysis (X3) drives a seeded DEMCzs MCMC over a Normal-copula BivariateDistribution (two pre-fit Normal marginals held fixed), then assembles the AND-joint-exceedance mode/mean curve + credible band over the 5-point XY ordinate grid. curve_length == 5 (one entry per XY ordinate) is the deterministic length invariant reproduced bit-identically across C++/R/Python. X12 tightens the joint-exceedance curve + credible band to an exact oracle against the real RMC.BestFit BivariateAnalysis via the emitter driver it must add.
